landing.subtitle: AI Communication Platform
landing.heroDesc: Transform your ideas into high-impact messages with AI-powered speaking coaching and intelligent video creation.
landing.howItWorksDesc: Four steps from idea to impactful communication
landing.builtForDesc: Whether you're pitching, teaching, or creating — Presencia helps you speak with power

audiences.entrepreneursDesc: Build authority and pitch with confidence
audiences.creatorsDesc: Create content that resonates and converts
audiences.professionalsDesc: Present ideas with clarity and impact

landing.moreThanDesc: A complete AI communication training ecosystem

benefits.coachDesc: Get real-time feedback on pacing, clarity, and delivery to continuously improve.
benefits.storytellingDesc: Use proven frameworks to structure your message for maximum persuasion.
benefits.analysisDesc: Detailed metrics on your communication skills with actionable improvement paths.

landing.ctaDesc: Join Presencia and start speaking with intention today.

auth.resetDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.signInDesc: Sign in to continue to Presencia
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for the reset link
auth.accountCreated: Account created! Check your email to confirm.

onboarding.experienceDesc: How experienced are you with public speaking or creating video content?
onboarding.beginnerDesc: Just getting started with video communication
onboarding.intermediateDesc: Some experience creating content or presenting
onboarding.advancedDesc: Regularly create content or speak professionally
onboarding.confidenceDesc: How confident do you feel speaking on camera right now?
onboarding.sectorDesc: What industry or field are you in?
onboarding.targetDesc: Who are you primarily trying to reach with your message?
onboarding.targetPlaceholder: e.g., Startup founders, College students, SMB owners...
onboarding.couldNotSave: Could not save profile. Please try again.

dashboard.subtitle: Track your growth as a confident communicator.
dashboard.noDataDesc: Record and analyze your first video to start tracking your communication growth. Each session adds to your skill profile.

templates.title: Template Library
templates.subtitle: Proven communication structures to accelerate your message. Pick one, customize it, record.
templates.noTemplatesDesc: Try selecting a different category or browse all templates.

myVideos.title: My Videos
myVideos.subtitle: Your library of recorded video sessions.
myVideos.noVideosDesc: Create your first video to see it here. Each recording includes AI-powered analysis and feedback.

recording.title: Recording Studio
recording.ready: Your environment is ready. Start recording!
recording.analyzingDesc: Our AI is evaluating your delivery against the selected methodology. This may take a few seconds.
recording.speechNotSupported: Speech recognition not supported in this browser. Teleprompter will scroll manually.

analysis.clarityDesc: How clear and structured the message is
analysis.recommendReRecord: We recommend re-recording for better results.

createVideo.title: Create Video
createVideo.subtitle: Follow the flow to craft your high-impact message.
createVideo.chooseImpact: Choose the communication impact you want to create.
createVideo.answersShape: Answer thoughtfully. Your answers will shape the AI-generated script.
createVideo.refineDesc: Tell the AI how to improve your script. Each change updates it in real-time.
createVideo.chatPlaceholder: e.g. Make the hook more provocative...
createVideo.validateDesc: Review the final version. Once validated, you'll unlock the recording phase.
